Title: Establishes a subpart to hear eviction matters related to affordable housing providers and small landlords
Summary: Establishes a subpart to hear eviction matters related to affordable housing providers and small landlords; provides a subpart shall be in each borough of the city of New York; defines terms.
LawSection: New York City Civil Court Act
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the New York city civil court act, in relation to establishing a subpart to hear eviction matters related to affordable housing providers and small landlords
